mapper.sql:
AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( c.name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR c.mobile ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND c.planner_id = #{plannerId}
AND c.is_active = true
AND c.is_active = false
mapper.select:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.planner_id, c.name, c.mobile, c.is_active, c.created_id, c.created_at, c.updated_id, c.updated_at, p.name AS planner_name, p.planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p ON c.planner_id = p.planner_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY c.customer_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p ON c.planner_id = p.planner_id WHERE 1=1

SELECT c.customer_id, c.planner_id, c.name, c.mobile, c.is_active, c.created_id, c.created_at, c.updated_id, c.updated_at, p.name AS planner_name, p.planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER c LEFT JOIN TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER p ON c.planner_id = p.planner_id WHERE c.customer_id = #{customerId} AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER SET name = #{name}, mobile = #{mobile}, planner_id = #{plannerId}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_id = #{updatedId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER SET deleted_id = #{deletedId}, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT customer_id, planner_id, name, mobile, is_active FROM TB_NTALK_USER_CUSTOMER WHERE mobile = #{mobile} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT planner_id, name AS planner_name, planner_code FROM TB_NTALK_USER_PLANNER WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY name ASC
